# Vanya Eco Products

Vanya Eco Products is a Kerala based spice and eco products brand from Wayanad, India.

Website:
https://www.vanyaecoproducts.in

Brand Name:
Vanya Eco Products

Brand Line:
Flavours by Vanya

Tagline:
Pure Spices, True Flavours.

About:
Vanya Eco Products focuses on authentic spices, masalas, teas, coffees, coconut oils, nuts, and natural products sourced from trusted farms and processed in small batches to preserve freshness, aroma, and purity.

Main Categories:
- Masalas
- Raw Spices
- Teas
- Coffees
- Coconut Oil
- Nuts
- Honey

Popular Products:
- Turmeric Powder
- Raw Pepper
- Cardamom
- Kashmiri Chilli Powder
- Garam Masala
- Wayanad Tea
- Wayanad Coffee
- Pure Virgin Coconut Oil
- Vendha Velichenna

Brand Values:
- Direct sourcing
- No preservatives
- No artificial colours
- Small batch processing
- Authentic Kerala flavours
- Farm to home approach

Location:
Wayanad, Kerala, India

Contact:
Phone: +91 79076 62508
Email: vanyaecoproducts@gmail.com

Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/vanya_eco_products

Google Business Profile:
Vanya Eco Products
